headline: Dollar Tree has an advantage Costco can't match
summary: When money is tight for consumers across the board, retailers like Dollar Tree and Costco tend to win out. A good 66% of Americans have reduced their overall spending due to rising prices, according to the Conference Board's May Consumer Confidence Index. April's Consumer Price Index, ...

headline: Costco Governance In Focus As CEO Earned Board Diversity Leadership Honor
summary: Costco Wholesale CEO Ron Vachris is set to receive the Muriel F. Siebert Leadership Award from 50/50 Women on Boards. The award recognizes his role in advancing women in leadership and corporate governance at Costco. This recognition highlights board diversity as a growing ESG focus for investors watching NasdaqGS:COST. For investors watching NasdaqGS:COST, this recognition adds an ESG and governance angle alongside the usual focus on earnings, traffic, and membership trends. Costco shares...
